newchat.label: New Chat
folders.label: Folders
archived.label: Archived

editor.staleMsg: This file was changed on disk by the agent. You have unsaved edits.
provider.warn: Model connection problem — click to fix
composer.editMode: Toggle Enter key: send vs new line
ctxbrowser.title: Add Context
usercmd.name: Name
usercmd.argsSubhint: shown next to the command name in the slash menu
usercmd.promptHint: Use $1, $2 … for positional args, $* for all args.
usercmd.promptPlaceholder: Review the staged changes carefully. Focus on $1 if provided.
skillmodal.title: Create skill
appearance.notifyLabel: Show a desktop notification when a background task finishes, or when a chat reply finishes while you're on another session or app.
appearance.notifyHint: In-app toasts always appear; this also surfaces a desktop notification (needs browser permission). Your choice is saved on the server.
appearance.themeHint: Pick a color palette. Applied immediately and saved on the server.
appearance.languageHint: Choose the interface language. The page reloads to apply it; your choice is saved on the server.
common.name: Name
app.error.lostConnection: ⚠️ Lost connection to the server. The agent may still be finishing — reopen this chat to see its reply.
app.skill.nameInvalid: Name must match: lowercase letters, digits, '-' or '.' (1–63 chars).
app.folder.deleteMsgFolder: Permanently delete “{name}” and all its contents? This cannot be undone.
app.folder.deleteMsgFile: Permanently delete “{name}”? This cannot be undone.
app.rewind.title: Rewind conversation
app.rewind.message: This permanently removes this turn and everything after it from this conversation. Earlier turns are kept and the model's memory is rewound to match. Continue?
app.notify.allowMsg: Notifications are turned on in Omnis, but your browser is blocking them for this site. {hint} A website can't grant this itself — it has to be allowed in the browser.
app.update.downloading: Downloading and installing… this can take a minute.
app.update.installedRestart: Installed v{version}. Restart the server to run the new version.
app.provider.stillBad: Still can't connect: {providers}. Check the values and try again.
app.notify.unblockFirefox: Click the permissions icon at the left of the address bar and clear the “Blocked” state for Notifications (or set it to Allow), then reload.
app.notify.unblockSafari: Open Safari → Settings → Websites → Notifications and set this site to Allow, then reload.
app.notify.unblockChromium: Click the site-info icon (the tune/ⓘ control just left of the address bar) → Site settings → Notifications → Allow, then reload.
app.locale.offerMsg: Your browser prefers {language}. Would you like to use the Omnis interface in {language}? You can change this any time in Settings → Appearance.
tool.desc.Bash: Run shell commands in the working directory.
tool.desc.Read: Read file contents from the filesystem.
tool.desc.Write: Write or overwrite files on the filesystem.
tool.desc.Edit: Surgical in-place string replacement in a file.
tool.desc.Grep: Search file contents with regular expressions.
tool.desc.revert: Revert a file to its last snapshot.
tool.desc.mime: Detect the MIME type of a file.
tool.desc.mcp: MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools: connect to external MCP servers defined in mcp_config.json.
tool.desc.Skill: Skill tools: load and list skill playbooks from the skills/ directory.
tool.desc.softskills: Soft-skill tools: load and list curator-distilled procedures from the softskills/ directory.
tool.desc.calc: Calculator: evaluate mathematical expressions (arithmetic, sqrt, trig, log, pow…).
tool.desc.ddg: Web search: search the web via DuckDuckGo (no API key required).
tool.desc.serpapi: Web search: search the web via SerpAPI (Google). Requires serpapi_key in globals. Cannot be used together with ddg.
tool.desc.web: Web tools: fetch a web page as Markdown (web_fetch) or convert an HTML string to Markdown (html_to_markdown).
tool.desc.registries: Skill registry tools: list configured remote registries, browse them, fetch a SKILL.md, install a skill, and link it to an agent.
tool.desc.code_search: Semantic code search (search_code, reindex_code): find code by meaning over the repo index. Mounted only when an embedding model is configured; otherwise the agent falls back to grep/read.
tool.desc.docs: Documentation tools: answer questions about omnis from its own docs. Always provides list_docs / read_doc / grep_docs; adds semantic search_docs / reindex_docs when an embedding model is configured.
set.cmd.empty: No user commands yet. Click "Add command" to create one.
set.cmd.hint: Slash commands shown in the chat composer. Built-in commands are reserved. User commands expand to a prompt template that is sent to the agent — use $1, $2, … for positional args and $* for all args.
set.appearance.notifyBlockedFallback: Notifications are turned on in Omnis, but your browser is blocking them. Allow notifications for this site via the site-info icon at the left of the address bar, then reload.
set.appearance.notifyUnsupported: This browser does not support desktop notifications.
set.banner.restartText: Embedder changed — a server restart is required to apply it (hot-reload can't swap the embedder).
set.banner.reloadText: Configuration changed — apply with hot-reload (no downtime).
set.banner.reloaded: Reloaded — new sessions will use the updated configuration.
set.overlay.restartingFull:
Server is restarting…
The page will reload automatically.
set.reload.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Save them before reloading?
set.reload.summaryDraining: Reloaded — generation {generation}. {count} session(s) draining on previous version.
set.reload.failedBanner: Reload failed: {error} — fix the configuration and try again.
set.restart.confirm: Restart the omnis server now? Active streams will be interrupted.
set.restart.pageReload: Server restarting — page will reload shortly…
set.restart.notBack: Server did not come back within 30s. Reload manually.
set.confirm.discardTab: Discard unsaved changes in the current tab?
set.confirm.discardView: Discard unsaved changes in this view?
set.confirm.expectedServersInputs: Expected a JSON object with `servers` and/or `inputs`.
set.confirm.nothingToImport: Nothing to import — no valid servers or inputs found.
set.confirm.skillStillUsed: "{name}" is still used by: {agents}. Remove links and delete?
set.confirm.installSquad: Install squad "{name}"? It will be merged into config/agents.json and available after the next reload.
set.perm.modeHint: Behaviour for tool calls matching no rule. Rules are evaluated deny → ask → allow (deny always wins).
set.agent.recommendedTip: Recommended by the agent's instruction.md frontmatter (no matching entry in models.json).
set.agent.maxInstancesTip: 1 = run one at a time (default). >1 lets the leader dispatch up to this many independent tasks to this agent in one parallel batch call.
set.agent.maxInstancesHint: 1 = serial (one at a time). Higher values let the leader run that many independent tasks for this agent in parallel.
set.agent.resumableTip: On by default. Each call returns a session handle the leader can pass back to resume that exact conversation (keeping its prior context) instead of starting fresh. Turn off to make this agent a stateless pure function.
set.agent.resumableHint: On by default. The agent keeps its session so the leader can resume an earlier call where it left off — letting it feed mid-turn steering to a running sub-agent without restarting it. Turn off for a fresh, stateless session per call.
set.agent.descPlaceholder: Explain what this agent does in one sentence…
set.squad.empty: No squads defined. Click + to add one.
set.squad.defaultNameHint: The default squad is required and its name cannot be changed.
set.squad.leaderlessHint: Leaderless: the single selected agent runs directly with only its own declared tools (plus ask_user and the teammate mailbox). No coordinator.
set.squad.membersHintLeaderless: Pick exactly one agent — it runs as the squad on its own.
set.squad.membersHint: Sub-agents the leader can delegate to (the leader itself is not selectable).
set.env.softskillsDesc: Path where soft-skill playbooks are stored.
set.block.skillToolWarn: "Skill" tool not enabled — assignments will be ignored until re-enabled in Agent → Agents.
set.block.mcpToolWarn: "mcp" tool not enabled — selections will be ignored until re-enabled above.
set.block.noMcp: No MCP servers configured. Add some in the MCP tab.
set.block.noA2a: No A2A agents configured. Add some in the A2A tab.
set.model.providersDesc: A provider groups a kind (anthropic, openai, openai_compat, gemini) with a base URL and API key. Models reference a provider and inherit its credentials.
set.model.testTip: Fetch model list from this provider
set.model.removeProviderRefs:
Remove provider "{name}"?

These models reference it and will lose their credentials: {refs}
set.model.modelsDesc: Each model references a provider for credentials and endpoint. Use the ⟳ button to populate the model list from the provider. Mark a model EMBEDDING to make it selectable as the internal semantic embedder.
set.model.noEmbedModels: (no embedding models — tick EMBEDDING MODEL on a model below)
set.model.embedDesc: Drives soft-skill / precedent / codebase semantic recall. Changing it rebuilds the indexes on next use; a server restart applies it.
set.model.unused: Unused — no agent uses this model
set.model.streamTip: stream this model's output (off = use the non-streaming endpoint)
set.model.cacheTip: prompt-cache this model's long-lived prefix (for a LiteLLM proxy fronting an Anthropic model; leave off for a plain OpenAI endpoint)
set.model.cachedInputTip: price for prompt tokens served from the provider's cache (cache read); defaults to the input price
set.model.cacheCreationTip: price for prompt tokens written to the provider's cache (cache creation); defaults to the input price
set.model.name: NAME
set.hook.intro: Shell commands run at lifecycle moments. Each command receives the event as JSON on stdin and runs through the Bash safety floor. Same format as Claude Code hooks.
hook.hint.PreToolUse: Before a tool runs. matcher = tool-name regexp (e.g. Write|Edit). Exit 2 or a {"decision":"block"} / permissionDecision "deny" blocks the tool.
hook.hint.PostToolUse: After a tool runs. matcher = tool-name regexp. A block decision feeds the reason back to the model.
hook.hint.UserPromptSubmit: When a prompt is submitted. stdout (or additionalContext) is injected into the turn; exit 2 / block aborts it.
hook.hint.Stop: When the agent finishes a turn.
hook.hint.SubagentStop: When a sub-agent invocation finishes. matcher = sub-agent name.
hook.hint.SessionStart: When a session is created. stdout is injected as context.
hook.hint.SessionEnd: When a session ends (CLI/TUI exit, or web session delete).
hook.hint.PreCompact: Before context compaction. matcher = trigger (manual / auto / hard).
hook.hint.Notification: On a notification (e.g. a permission / ask-user prompt).
set.mcp.importMergeHint: Merge servers and inputs from a VS Code or Claude Code mcp.json snippet.
set.mcp.inputsHint: Declare values the user is prompted for at first use. Reference them from server fields as ${input:id}.
set.mcp.importDialogHint: Paste a snippet with `servers` and/or `inputs`. Existing entries are kept; name conflicts are renamed.
set.mcp.noInputs: No inputs declared. Add one if any server needs a user-supplied value.
set.mcp.descPlaceholder: Shown to the user at prompt time
set.mcp.treatAsPassword: Treat as password (mask input when prompting)
set.mcp.idInUse: Another input already uses the id "{id}".
set.mcp.inputEmbedHint: Embed "${input:id}" anywhere in the value to have the user prompted for that input at first use.
set.tool.serpapiDisabled: Set serpapi_key in Globals to enable this tool.
set.reg.tokenKeepHint: Leave blank to keep existing token
set.reg.kindHint: Tab where this registry will appear.
set.a2a.inputsHint: Declare values the user is prompted for at first use. Reference them from agent fields as ${input:id}.
set.a2a.endpointsHint: Remote agent endpoints reachable via the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol.
set.a2a.noInputs: No inputs declared. Add one if any agent needs a user-supplied value.
set.reg.empty.skills: No skills found in this registry.
set.reg.empty.agents: No agents found in this registry.
set.reg.empty.squads: No squads found in this registry. Directories must contain a squad.json file.
set.reg.empty.mcp: No MCP servers found in this registry. Directories must contain a .json manifest file.
set.reg.empty.a2a: No A2A agents found in this registry. Directories must contain an a2a.json file.
set.reg.empty.commands: No slash commands found in this registry. Files must be markdown (.md) with optional YAML frontmatter.
set.reg.empty.permissions: No permission rule-sets found. Each must be a directory containing a permissions.json file.
set.reg.reindexTip: Rebuild the semantic registry index (all kinds: skills, agents, squads, MCP, A2A, commands)
set.cmd.remoteHint: Browse and install slash commands from GitHub, GitLab, or Gitea repositories. Commands use Anthropic's Claude Code format — one markdown file per command, with optional YAML frontmatter (description, argument-hint).
set.perm.remoteHint: Browse and install permission rule-sets from GitHub, GitLab, or Gitea repositories. Each rule-set is a directory holding a permissions.json (permissions.deny / permissions.ask / permissions.allow; old always_deny/always_allow/ask_user files are auto-converted). Installing merges its rules into your permissions.json (deduped by rule).
set.agent.importHint: Paste a .md (YAML frontmatter) or .json agent definition, or load a file.
